# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-peer-auth
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: microservices-peer-auth
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
  annotations:
    description: "PeerAuthentication policy for backward compatibility during service mesh migration. Allows both plaintext and mTLS traffic (PERMISSIVE mode). This should be migrated to STRICT mode once all services are onboarded to the mesh."
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  selector:
    matchLabels: {}
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-auth-sensitive-services
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: strict-auth-sensitive-services
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
  annotations:
    description: "Enforce STRICT mTLS for sensitive services that have already been migrated to the mesh. Apply this to services handling PII or authentication data."
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      security-tier: sensitive
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: deny-all-default
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: deny-all-default
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
  annotations:
    description: "Default deny-all authorization policy for defense in depth. Explicit allow policies must be created for each service-to-service communication path."
spec:
  {}
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-mesh-internal-traffic
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: allow-mesh-internal-traffic
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
  annotations:
    description: "Allow traffic from authenticated mesh peers within the microservices namespace during migration. Tighten to specific service accounts post-migration."
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - microservices
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: microservices-mtls-destination
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: microservices-mtls-destination
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
  annotations:
    description: "DestinationRule to configure client-side mTLS settings. Uses ISTIO_MUTUAL to leverage Istio-managed certificates for mesh-internal traffic."
spec:
  host: "*.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
